channel.title: publication on Ziniu Li
channel.description: Recent content in publication on Ziniu Li

item.title: Publication
item.description: My publication profile at Google Scholar. * indicates the equal contribution. [2021] Ziniu Li, Yingru Li, Hao Liang, Tong Zhang. Efficient Exploration by HyperDQN in Deep Reinforcement Learning. Reinforcement Learning for Real Life Workshop @ ICML 2021. [poster] Tian Xu, Ziniu Li*, Yang Yu. Nearly Minimax Optimal Adversarial Imitation Learning with Known and Unknown Transitions. arXiv:2106.10424. [paper] [2020] Tian Xu, Ziniu Li, Yang Yu.
